Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the compartment to create the agent in.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly name. Does not have to be unique, and it is changeable. Avoid entering confidential information.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Description about the agent.
  • knowledge_base_ids - (Optional) (Updatable) List of OCIDs of the knowledge bases associated with the agent. This field is deprecated and will be removed after March 26 2026.
  • welcome_message - (Optional) (Updatable) Details about purpose and responsibility of the agent.
  • llm_config - (Optional) (Updatable) Configuration to Agent LLM.
    • runtime_version - (Optional) (Updatable) The runtimeVersion of the system prompt.
    • routing_llm_customization - (Optional) (Updatable) Configuration to customize LLM.
      • instruction - (Optional) (Updatable) If specified, the default instruction is replaced with the provided instruction.
      • llm_hyper_parameters - (Optional) (Updatable) Hyper parameters for LLM configuration.
      • llm_selection - (Optional) (Updatable) LLM selection configuration.
        • llm_selection_type - (Required) (Updatable) The LLM selection type.
        • model_id - (Applicable when llm_selection_type=CUSTOM_GEN_AI_MODEL) (Updatable) The OCID of the GenAI model.
        • endpoint_id - (Applicable when llm_selection_type=CUSTOM_GEN_AI_ENDPOINT) (Updatable) The OCID of the GenAI endpoint.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
